headline: Analysts Remain Constructive on McDonald’s (MCD) Following Strong Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Performance
summary: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is one of the best stocks to buy for financial stability. As of March 27, 2026, analyst sentiment surrounding McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) remains mixed. While roughly 50% of covering analysts remain bullish on the stock, over 40% remain mixed on the company’s near-term outlook. Accordingly, the consensus price target of $355 implies […]
